description_long: This sconce features a tall, ornate central stem with five upward-reaching arms, each holding a slender candle-shaped light source. The arms are intricately curved and adorned with decorative scrollwork, giving the fixture a classic, elegant appearance. The base is wide and flared, providing stability and a touch of traditional design. The entire structure appears to be made of a dark, possibly wrought iron or painted metal, with the candle elements rendered in a lighter color to mimic real wax candles. The overall silhouette is symmetrical and balanced, with each arm evenly spaced around the central stem. This sconce would be well-suited for historical or vintage-inspired urban settings, such as old city streets, parks, or building entrances.
description: An ornate, five-arm sconce with candle-shaped lights and decorative scrollwork, finished in dark metal. The design is symmetrical and vintage, evoking classic elegance.
description_view_0: Front view showing all five candle arms and the symmetrical scrollwork details.
description_view_1: Slightly rotated view revealing the depth and curvature of the arms and the layered arrangement of the candles.
description_view_2: Side view emphasizing the profile of the central stem and the outward reach of the arms.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, similar to view 1, highlighting the scrollwork and the even spacing of the candle holders.
attribute_fixture_design: The fixture has a vintage, classical design with ornate scrollwork and a symmetrical arrangement of arms. Its style is reminiscent of antique wrought iron candelabras often found in historical urban settings.
